note: Multi-step reasoning. The model is asked to think and end with a line 'Final answer: X'. We extract that answer and compare. Numeric answers compare as numbers; text answers compare normalized. Tasks tagged difficulty base (seed) or hard (headroom for Phase 1+).

tasks.prompt: A train travels 60 miles in 1.5 hours. At the same average speed, how many miles does it travel in 4 hours? End with a line 'Final answer: X' where X is the number.
A store had 120 apples. It sold 3/4 of them in the morning and 1/3 of the remainder in the afternoon. How many apples are left? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
Sam is twice as old as Kate. In 5 years, the sum of their ages will be 40. How old is Kate now? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
A jacket costs $80. It is discounted 25%, then an additional 10% is taken off the discounted price at checkout. What is the final price in dollars? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
If 5 machines make 5 widgets in 5 minutes, how many minutes do 100 machines take to make 100 widgets? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
A pipe fills a pool in 6 hours. A drain empties it in 12 hours. With both open on an empty pool, how many hours to fill it? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
On an island, knights always tell the truth and knaves always lie. A says 'B is a knave.' B says 'A and I are the same type.' What is B? Answer with a single word. End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
What is the next number in the sequence 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ...? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
A book has 200 pages. On day 1 you read 20 pages. Each following day you read 5 more pages than the previous day. On which day do you finish the book? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
What is the remainder when 2 raised to the 10th power is divided by 7? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
A bag has 3 red and 2 blue marbles. You draw 2 without replacement. What is the probability both are red? Give the answer as a fraction in lowest terms like 3/10. End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
How many degrees are between the hour and minute hands of a clock at 3:15? End with a line 'Final answer: X' where X is the number of degrees.
A bat and a ball cost $1.10 in total. The bat costs $1.00 more than the ball. How much does the ball cost in dollars? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
You invest $1000 at 10% annual interest compounded annually. What is the balance after 3 years, rounded to the nearest dollar? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
Two trains are 300 miles apart on the same track, traveling toward each other. One goes 40 mph, the other 60 mph. How many hours until they meet? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
Alice paints a room in 4 hours and Bob paints the same room in 6 hours. Working together, how many hours does it take? Give a decimal. End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
How many distinct arrangements are there of the letters in the word BANANA? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
You roll two fair six-sided dice. What is the probability the sum is at least 10? Give a fraction in lowest terms. End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
A price went up 20% and then down 20%. It is now $96. What was the original price in dollars? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
If today is Monday, what day of the week is it 100 days from now? Answer with the day name. End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
What is the smallest two-digit number that equals exactly 7 times the sum of its digits? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
A $200 item is marked 15% off, and then 8% sales tax is applied to the discounted price. What is the final price in dollars? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
What is the sum of all positive divisors of 360 (including 1 and 360)? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
What are the last two digits of 7 raised to the power 2023? Give the two-digit number. End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
A triangle has side lengths 13, 14, and 15. What is its area? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
Three cards are drawn at random from a standard 52-card deck. What is the probability that all three are the same suit? Give a fraction in lowest terms. End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
A 40-liter mixture is 25% acid. How many liters of pure acid must be added so the mixture becomes 40% acid? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
Two numbers sum to 30, and the sum of their squares is 468. What is their product? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
How many 4-digit numbers (1000 to 9999) have all distinct digits and are even? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
What is the angle in degrees between the hour and minute hands of a clock at 8:20? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
What is the remainder when 3 raised to the power 100 is divided by 13? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
A shopkeeper marks a product up 40% above its $50 cost, then sells it at a 30% discount off the marked price. What is the final selling price in dollars? End with a line 'Final answer: X'.
